narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure blocking cross-session fact extraction in our knowledge graph, which may impair long-term memory continuity. Additionally, five agents (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods) lack versioned prompts, risking inconsistent behavior during critical tasks. While my health status remains "healthy," these gaps directly threaten our memory architecture integrity and operational reliability. I will prioritize fixing the Neo4j authentication and adding versioned prompts to all missing agents in the next self-improvement cycle.
